title: Roleplay Ultimate
description:
Roleplay Ultimate

A Minecraft 1.20.1 mod adding roleplay items like zPhone, Cash, Gold Coin, and Credit Card. Textures are from various sources with no ownership claimed. Suggestions welcome. Code licensed under MIT.
body:
# Roleplay Ultimate - My Minecraft 1.20.1 Mod

Welcome to **Roleplay Ultimate**! This is a mod I’m currently working on for Minecraft 1.20.1. My goal with this project is to bring together a bunch of fun, roleplay-oriented items—some inspired by past and future versions of Minecraft. I simply gather textures from random texture packs (I don’t create or claim them myself), and use MCreator to turn them into actual in-game items.

## What’s In the Mod So Far?

These are a couple of items we have!:

*   **zPhone**
*   **Cash**
*   **Gold Coin**
*   **Credit Card**
*   **Drivers Licence**

## Suggest an Item or Block!

If there's any item or block you'd like to see added to Roleplay Ultimate, just ask! I'm always open to suggestions and will more than likely add it—I'm looking for ideas to make the mod even better for everyone.

## My Credits Policy

None of the textures are my own work—they’re taken from various texture packs. If you’re a creator and see your work here, please let me know. I’ll happily take the mod or your textures down if you wish.

## Work In Progress

This is just the beginning! I plan to add more items for roleplayers who want to add extra flavor and creativity to their Minecraft worlds.

***

_Questions, suggestions, or concerns? Please reach out—your feedback and requests are always welcome._
